response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r2c0 is 0.20 below threshold (SoC ~0.05), below our 0.25 minimum; allocating 0.5 kWh supports neighborhood resilience while maintaining conservative posture via geographic distribution.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c0. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.20 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Larger neighbors are actively sharing; I must conserve strictly while contributing modestly to the most-needy peers (r1c1 and r2c2 at 10% SoC) via geographic round-robin to maximize neighborhood resilience..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
